description: Scoped filesystem storage — a smart notebook for durable LLM artifacts. Backed by the path in config.json agents.storage.root (default: D:\MCP_Storage). When agents.storage.uncShare is also configured, callers may pass EITHER the local path or the UNC share form — the server translates UNC to local before resolving, so both work transparently. Useful for staging forge inputs and retrieving forge outputs across machines. Forge outputs land at <root>\forge\<tool-name>\* and are also listed in the forge_call response as _outputs (each with an `uncPath` field for direct SMB access when uncShare is configured).

tools.name: storage_stat
tools.description: Check if a path exists and what type it is (file or directory), without reading content. Returns exists, type, size, and modified time.

tools.name: storage_read
tools.description: Read a file from storage. Returns utf8 text by default; use encoding=base64 for binaries. Files above the inline threshold (default 64 KB) return a URL pointer (httpUrl field) instead of inline content — fetch the actual file via fetch_webpage using that URL. The REST endpoint streams the file directly from disk, bypassing the MCP transport-size limit that kills inline text responses on large files (chat-app client hits 'MCP stream ended without response' around 400 KB). For LAN clients, the same file is also reachable via the UNC share configured in agents.storage.uncShare.

tools.name: storage_write
tools.description: Write a file to storage. Creates parent directories automatically. Overwrites existing files. Content can be utf8 text or base64-encoded binary. Files above maxWriteSize are rejected.

content.description: File content (string for utf8, base64 string for binary)

tools.name: storage_list
tools.description: List a directory in storage. Returns entries with name, type, size, modified time, and relative path. Use recursive=true for a flat list of all descendants.

recursive.description: List all descendants as a flat list (default: false)

tools.name: storage_move
tools.description: Move or rename a file or directory within storage. Refuses to overwrite an existing destination.

tools.name: storage_delete
tools.description: Delete a file or directory. Requires recursive=true to delete non-empty directories.

path.description: Path to delete within storage root

recursive.description: Required to delete non-empty directories (default: false)
